glosses.vi: đi bộ đường dài; di cư

sentences.target: Wir haben gestern eine Wanderung gemacht.

translations.de: Wir haben gestern eine Wanderung gemacht.
translations.en: We went on a hike yesterday.
translations.fr: Nous avons fait une randonnée hier.
translations.vi: Hôm qua bọn mình đi leo núi.
translations.ar: ذهبنا في نزهة سيرًا على الأقدام أمس.
translations.hi: हम कल पैदल यात्रा पर गए थे.
translations.nb: Vi gikk på tur i går.
translations.sv: Vi var ute och vandrade i går.
translations.da: Vi var på vandretur i går.
translations.ja: 昨日ハイキングに行きました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present tense, 1st person plural; forms the Perfekt with the past participle.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause to indicate time.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner for 'Wanderung' as direct object.
Noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of the verb ('gemacht').
Past participle (Partizip II) of the main verb; clause-final position in the Perfekt.

sentences.target: Meine Eltern machen morgen eine Wanderung.

translations.de: Meine Eltern machen morgen eine Wanderung.
translations.en: My parents are going on a hike tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana mis padres van a hacer una caminata.
translations.fr: Mes parents vont faire une randonnée demain.
translations.it: Domani i miei genitori vanno a fare un'escursione.
translations.ru: Мои родители завтра пойдут в поход.
translations.pt: Amanhã meus pais vão fazer uma trilha.
translations.he: מחר ההורים שלי יוצאים לטיול רגלי.
translations.vi: Ngày mai bố mẹ tôi đi leo núi.
translations.ar: غدًا سيذهب والداي في نزهة سيرًا עלالأقدام.
translations.uk: Мої батьки завтра підуть у похід.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता कल पैदल यात्रा पर जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Moi rodzice jutro idą na wędrówkę.
translations.el: Αύριο οι γονείς μου θα πάνε για πεζοπορία.
translations.nb: I morgen skal foreldrene mine på tur.
translations.id: Besok orang tua saya akan pergi mendaki.
translations.sv: I morgon ska mina föräldrar ut och vandra.
translations.ro: Mâine părinții mei merg în drumeție.
translations.cs: Moji rodiče zítra půjdou na túru.
translations.da: I morgen skal mine forældre på vandretur.
translations.ja: 明日、両親はハイキングに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, agrees with plural 'Eltern'; modifies the subject.
Noun, plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person plural; predicate of the sentence.
Temporal adverb; indicates future time.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner for 'Wanderung'.
Noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'machen'.

sentences.target: Die Wanderung fällt wegen des Regens aus.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈvandəʁʊŋ fɛlt ˈveːɡən dɛs ˈʁeːɡəns aʊ̯s/

translations.de: Die Wanderung fällt wegen des Regens aus.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈvandəʁʊŋ fɛlt ˈveːɡən dɛs ˈʁeːɡəns aʊ̯s/
translations.en: The hike is canceled because of the rain.
translations.es: La caminata se canceló por la lluvia.
translations.fr: La randonnée est annulée à cause de la pluie.
translations.it: L'escursione è annullata a causa della pioggia.
translations.zh-Hans: 由于下雨，徒步活动取消了。
translations.yue: 因為落雨，個行山活動取消咗。
translations.pt: A trilha foi cancelada por causa da chuva.
translations.vi: Buổi đi leo núi bị hủy vì mưa.
translations.nl: De wandeling is afgelast vanwege de regen.
translations.hu: Az eső miatt elmarad a túra.
translations.hi: बारिश के कारण पैदल यात्रा रद्द कर दी गई है.
translations.pl: Wędrówka została odwołana z powodu deszczu.
translations.nb: Turen er avlyst på grunn av regn.
translations.sv: Vandringen är inställd på grund av regn.
translations.ro: Drumeția a fost anulată din cauza ploii.
translations.da: Vandreturen er aflyst på grund af regn.
translations.ja: 雨のためハイキングは中止になりました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner for the subject.
Noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; lexical part of the separable verb 'ausfallen' ('to be canceled').
Preposition governing genitive; introduces a cause phrase.
Definite article, masculine genitive singular; determiner for 'Regens' after 'wegen'.
Noun, masculine genitive singular; object of the preposition 'wegen'.
Separable verbal particle; completes the verb 'fällt' to form 'ausfallen'.

sentences.target: Ich freue mich auf die Wanderung.

translations.de: Ich freue mich auf die Wanderung.
translations.en: I’m looking forward to the hike.
translations.fr: J'ai hâte de faire la randonnée.
translations.it: Non vedo l'ora di fare l'escursione.
translations.vi: Tôi mong chờ chuyến đi leo núi.
translations.nl: Ik kijk uit naar de wandeling.
translations.hi: मुझे इस पैदल यात्रा का बेसब्री से इंतज़ार है.
translations.ja: ハイキングが楽しみです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; part of the reflexive construction 'sich freuen (über/auf)'.
Reflexive pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; object of 'freue'.
Preposition; in 'sich freuen auf', selects accusative for the following noun phrase.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner for 'Wanderung'.
Noun, feminine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'auf'.
